mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_order (order_no, user_id, pet_id, package_id, months, total_price, status, course_name, package_name, pet_name, coupon_id, coupon_amount, final_price) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{petId}, #{packageId}, #{months}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{courseName}, #{packageName}, #{petName}, #{couponId}, #{couponAmount}, #{finalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, pet_id, package_id, months, total_price, status, create_time, course_name, package_name, pet_name, coupon_id, coupon_amount, final_price FROM pet_order WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, pet_id, package_id, months, total_price, status, create_time, course_name, package_name, pet_name, coupon_id, coupon_amount, final_price FROM pet_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, pet_id, package_id, months, total_price, status, create_time, course_name, package_name, pet_name, coupon_id, coupon_amount, final_price FROM pet_order ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pet_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM pet_order WHERE id IN
#{id}
